description: The RibbonFollowerColorRangeInitializer component gives ribbon followers in a particle system a random color in a range upon start.

fields.MinValue: The minimum color a ribbon follower can have.
fields.MaxValue: The maximum color a ribbon follower can have.

usage: Attach to a slot, add to the list of modules in a ParticleSystem, and adjust the values to make the desired effect from this component.
